name: Guacamole (Avocado Sauce)
recipeIngredient: 1 medium tomato, peeled, seeded, and chopped
2 each serrano chile peppers, canned, and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and mash very ripe avocados.
2. Mix well with the remaining ingredients.
3. Pile into a serving dish with an avocado pit in the center.
4. If not using immediately, cover tightly with foil or plastic wrap and refrigerate.
5. Use as a sauce or salad dressing. Also an excellent dip.
